name: cw-workflow
description: Codex skills for the CW coding workflow kernel.

interface.shortDescription: Run CW workflow actions from Codex.
interface.longDescription: CW Workflow provides Codex skills that use repository-local .cw task state, project baseline files, and kernel helpers.
